items.title: Unauthenticated PHP object injection flaw in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: A critical unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in the Mirasvit Cache Warmer extension for Magento and Adobe Commerce allows remote code execution via a crafted cookie on any storefront page. Mirasvit released a patched version (1.11.12) on May 25, 2026.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This Adobe Security Bulletin resolves multiple critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source. Successful exploitation could lead to arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, security feature bypass, and privilege escalation.

items.title: Unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce REST API
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical flaw, named 'PolyShell', in Magento's REST API that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store by disguising code as an image, potentially leading to remote code execution. Adobe released a fix in Magento 2.4.9.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This Adobe Security Bulletin addresses multiple critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source. Successful exploitation could lead to security feature bypass, application denial-of-service, privilege escalation, arbitrary code execution, and arbitrary file system read.
